languages.text:
Воины Заркова не привыкли пасовать перед чудовищами.
Вперед ринулся сержант. Я не знал его имени, но навсегда запомню лицо: осунувшееся, безгранично спокойное. Твари пронзили его тело когтями... но даже умирая, боец успел активировать мельта-заряд, испепеливший жуткое исчадие вместе с ним. Еще несколько зарковчан последовали его примеру — и раненые чудовища были добиты выжившими товарищами героев.

traits.locale_text:
Все, что люди могли противопоставить бесплотному ужасу — свои волю, разум и воинское мастерство. Воины, выросшие в неласковых пустошах мира смерти, не привыкли спасовать перед чудовищами, какими бы непостижимыми и угрожающими те ни были.
Вперед ринулся сержант. Я не знал его имени, но навсегда запомню лицо: испещренное шрамами, осунувшееся, безгранично спокойное. Тварь клюнула мгновенно, материализовавшись, сомкнув смертоносные лезвия на его теле... и совершила фатальную ошибку. Синхронные вспышки плазменных гранат разорвали на куски и охотника, и заглоченную им наживку.

languages.text:
The soldiers of Zarkov were not in the habit of faltering in the face of monsters.
A sergeant charged forward. I did not know his name, but I shall always remember his face: weary yet utterly calm. The creatures' claws ran him through... but the dying soldier managed to activate a melta charge that incinerated both himself and one of the abominations. Several other Zarkovians followed his example, and their surviving comrades finished off the damaged monsters.
languages.original_text:
Воины Заркова не привыкли пасовать перед чудовищами.
Вперед ринулся сержант. Я не знал его имени, но навсегда запомню лицо: осунувшееся, безгранично спокойное. Твари пронзили его тело когтями... но даже умирая, боец успел активировать мельта-заряд, испепеливший жуткое исчадие вместе с ним. Еще несколько зарковчан последовали его примеру — и раненые чудовища были добиты выжившими товарищами героев.

traits.locale_text:
The soldiers of Zarkov were not in the habit of faltering in the face of monsters.
A sergeant charged forward. I did not know his name, but I shall always remember his face: weary yet utterly calm. The creatures' claws ran him through... but the dying soldier managed to activate a melta charge that incinerated both himself and one of the abominations. Several other Zarkovians followed his example, and their surviving comrades finished off the damaged monsters.

The soldiers of Zarkov were not in the habit of faltering in the face of monsters.
A sergeant charged forward. I did not know his name, but I shall always remember his face: weary yet utterly calm. The creatures' claws ran him through... but the dying soldier managed to activate a plasma grenade that incinerated both himself and one of the abominations. Several other Zarkovians followed his example, and their surviving comrades finished off the damaged monsters.

Zarkov's warriors were not accustomed to faltering in the face of monsters.
A sergeant threw himself at the creatures. I did not know his name, but I shall always remember his face: drawn, infinitely calm. The creatures slammed into his body... and at the same second, a grenade exploded, blowing both the soldier and the metal creatures to smithereens. A few more explosions — and the remaining beasts were finished off by the brave souls' surviving comrades.

The warriors of Zarkov were not in the habit of faltering in the face of monsters.
A sergeant charged forward. I did not know his name, but I shall always remember his face: drawn and infinitely calm. The creatures' claws ran him through... but the dying soldier managed to activate a plasma grenade that incinerated both himself and one of the abominations. Several other Zarkovians followed his example, and their surviving comrades finished off the wounded monsters.

The soldiers of Zarkov were not in the habit of faltering in the face of monsters.
A sergeant charged forward. I did not know his name, but I shall always remember his face: weary yet utterly calm. The creatures' claws ran him through... but the dying soldier managed to activate a plasma grenade that incinerated both himself and one of the abominations. Several other Zarkovians followed his example, and their surviving comrades finished off the damaged monsters.

The soldiers of Zarkov were not in the habit of faltering in the face of monsters.
A sergeant charged forward. I did not know his name, but I shall always remember his face: weary yet utterly calm. The creatures' claws ran him through... but the dying soldier managed to activate a melta charge that incinerated both himself and one of the abominations. Several other Zarkovians followed his example, and their surviving comrades finished off the damaged monsters.

languages.text:
扎尔科夫的士兵可没有在怪物面前退缩的习惯。
一名军士率先冲锋。我不知道他的名字，但我会记住他的面容：疲惫，却又无比平静。怪物的利爪贯穿了他……但他在临死前成功引爆了一枚热熔炸弹，将自己和其中一头憎恶之物一同焚毁。其他扎尔科夫士兵纷纷效仿，幸存下来的战友则负责补上最后一击，将受伤的怪物彻底消灭。
languages.original_text:

A sergeant charged forward. I did not know his name, but I shall always remember his face: weary yet utterly calm. The creatures' claws ran him through... but the dying soldier managed to activate a melta charge that incinerated both himself and one of the abominations. Several other Zarkovians followed his example, and their surviving comrades finished off the damaged monsters.

一名军士率先冲锋。我不知道他的名字，但我会记住他的面容：疲惫，却又无比平静。怪物的利爪贯穿了他……但他在临死前成功引爆了一枚热熔炸弹，将自己和其中一头憎恶之物一同焚毁。其他扎尔科夫士兵纷纷效仿，幸存下来的战友则负责补上最后一击，将受伤的怪物彻底消灭。

languages.text:
Los soldados de Zarkov no tenían por costumbre ceder ante los monstruos.
Un sargento cargó de frente. Nunca llegaré a saber su nombre, pero tampoco olvidaré jamás su rostro, agotado pero sereno. Las garras de las criaturas lo atravesaron... pero el soldado moribundo logró activar una carga de fusión que consumió su cuerpo y el de una de las abominaciones. Varios otros zarkovianos siguieron su ejemplo, y los demás remataron a los monstruos dañados.
languages.original_text:
The soldiers of Zarkov were not in the habit of faltering in the face of monsters.
A sergeant charged forward. I did not know his name, but I shall always remember his face: weary yet utterly calm. The creatures' claws ran him through... but the dying soldier managed to activate a melta charge that incinerated both himself and one of the abominations. Several other Zarkovians followed his example, and their surviving comrades finished off the damaged monsters.

traits.locale_text:

Un sargento cargó de frente. Nunca llegaré a saber su nombre, pero tampoco olvidaré jamás su rostro, agotado pero sereno. Las garras de las criaturas lo atravesaron... pero el soldado moribundo logró activar una carga de fusión que consumió su cuerpo y el de una de las abominaciones. Varios otros zarkovianos siguieron su ejemplo, y los demás remataron a los monstruos dañados.

languages.text:
Les soldats de Zarkov n'avaient pas pour habitude de reculer face à des monstres.
Un sergent se jeta sur les créatures. J'ignorais jusqu'à son nom, mais jamais je n'oublierai son visage : marqué par la fatigue, et pourtant d'un calme infini. Les griffes de la créature le transpercèrent... mais avant de mourir, le soldat parvint à déclencher une charge à fusion, se sacrifiant pour emporter l'une des abominations avec lui. Plusieurs autres Zarkoviens suivirent son exemple, laissant le soin à leurs camarades survivants d'achever les monstres blessés.
languages.original_text:

A sergeant charged forward. I did not know his name, but I shall always remember his face: weary yet utterly calm. The creatures' claws ran him through... but the dying soldier managed to activate a melta charge that incinerated both himself and one of the abominations. Several other Zarkovians followed his example, and their surviving comrades finished off the damaged monsters.

languages.text: Zarkov askerleri, canavarlar karşısında tereddüt etmeye alışkın değildi. Bir çavuş öne atıldı. Adını bilmiyordum ama yüzünü her zaman hatırlayacağım: Yorgun ama son derece sakin. Yaratıkların pençeleri onu delip geçti... Ancak ölmekte olan asker, melta bombasıyla hem kendini hem de o iğrenç şeylerden birini yakıp kül etmeyi başardı. Diğer birkaç Zarkovlu da ona uydu. Hayatta kalan yoldaşları, hasar almış canavarların işini bitirdi.
languages.original_text:
The soldiers of Zarkov were not in the habit of faltering in the face of monsters.
A sergeant charged forward. I did not know his name, but I shall always remember his face: weary yet utterly calm. The creatures' claws ran him through... but the dying soldier managed to activate a melta charge that incinerated both himself and one of the abominations. Several other Zarkovians followed his example, and their surviving comrades finished off the damaged monsters.

traits.locale_text: Zarkov askerleri, canavarlar karşısında tereddüt etmeye alışkın değildi. Bir çavuş öne atıldı. Adını bilmiyordum ama yüzünü her zaman hatırlayacağım: Yorgun ama son derece sakin. Yaratıkların pençeleri onu delip geçti... Ancak ölmekte olan asker, melta bombasıyla hem kendini hem de o iğrenç şeylerden birini yakıp kül etmeyi başardı. Diğer birkaç Zarkovlu da ona uydu. Hayatta kalan yoldaşları, hasar almış canavarların işini bitirdi.

languages.text:
Die Soldaten von Zarkov dachten nicht daran, vor den Monstern zurückzuweichen.
Ein Sergeant stürmte voran. Ich kannte seinen Namen nicht, werde mich aber immer an sein Gesicht erinnern: müde, aber vollkommen ruhig. Die Klauen der Kreaturen durchbohrten ihn ... aber der sterbende Soldat konnte noch eine Melterladung zünden, die ihn selbst und eine der Abscheulichkeiten verbrannte. Mehrere Zarkovianer folgten seinem Beispiel, und ihre überlebenden Kameraden gaben den verwundeten Monstern den Rest.
languages.original_text:

Several other Zarkovians followed his example, and their surviving comrades finished off the damaged monsters.

Mehrere Zarkovianer folgten seinem Beispiel, und ihre überlebenden Kameraden gaben den verwundeten Monstern den Rest.

languages.text: ザルコフの戦士たちは、怪物に怯むことはなかった。一人の軍曹が怪物に突進した。彼の名前は知らなかったが、彼の顔は忘れない。引きつった顔、無限に静かな顔。怪物が彼の体に激突した…そして同時に、手榴弾が爆発し、軍曹と金属の怪物は粉々に砕けた。数発の爆発の後、残った怪物は勇敢な戦士たちの仲間によって倒された。
languages.original_text:
Zarkov's warriors were not accustomed to faltering in the face of monsters.
A sergeant threw himself at the creatures. I did not know his name, but I shall always remember his face: drawn, infinitely calm. The creatures slammed into his body... and at the same second, a grenade exploded, blowing both the soldier and the metal creatures to smithereens. A few more explosions — and the remaining beasts were finished off by the brave souls' surviving comrades.

traits.locale_text:
ザルコフの戦士たちは、怪物に怯むことはなかった。
一人の軍曹が怪物に突進した。彼の名前は知らなかったが、彼の顔は忘れない。引きつった顔、無限に静かな顔。怪物が彼の体に激突した…そして同時に、手榴弾が爆発し、軍曹と金属の怪物は粉々に砕けた。数発の爆発の後、残った怪物は勇敢な戦士たちの仲間によって倒された。
